recent_examples.quote: Just reaching back out about that design for your home. We didn't get a chance to meet with you last week, so I was calling to see if you'd be available. I have a specialist who can meet with you and help you explore your options.

I was just giving you a follow-up call because we had a, time set up to share a solar design with you, but that had fallen through. So we were just seeing if there'd be a better day better day next week that would work for you.
what now we see a a good day to show you that. We can do it over the phone for you.
And then I can give you a callback once I have more updated imagery. Does that work for you?
Let me ask you I think my phone is gonna work. Are you with the Valley Electric? Is that your power provider?
I actually know that we we don't work with Valley Electric anyway. So I'll just take you off my list here. I appreciate your time.
